  • Exports
Source   Edit  

Core game state representation for EC4X

Imports

../common/hex, ../common/system, ../common/types/core, ../common/types/planets, ../common/types/tech, ../common/types/diplomacy, fleet, ship, starmap, config/prestige_config, config/military_config, config/tech_config, diplomacy/types, espionage/types, research/types, economy/types

Types

BuildingType {.pure.} = enum
  Infrastructure, Shipyard, ResearchLab, DefenseGrid
Source   Edit   
CapacityViolation = object
  active*: bool
  violationType*: string
  turnsRemaining*: int
  violationTurn*: int
Tracks fighter capacity violations and grace period Source   Edit   
Colony = object
  systemId*: SystemId
  owner*: HouseId
  population*: int
  infrastructure*: int
  planetClass*: PlanetClass
  resources*: ResourceRating
  buildings*: seq[BuildingType]
  production*: int
  underConstruction*: Option[ConstructionProject]
  unassignedSquadrons*: seq[Squadron]
  unassignedSpaceLiftShips*: seq[SpaceLiftShip]
  autoAssignFleets*: bool
  fighterSquadrons*: seq[FighterSquadron]
  capacityViolation*: CapacityViolation
  starbases*: seq[Starbase]
  spaceports*: seq[Spaceport]
  shipyards*: seq[Shipyard]
  planetaryShieldLevel*: int
  groundBatteries*: int
  armies*: int
  marines*: int
  blockaded*: bool
  blockadedBy*: seq[HouseId]
  blockadeTurns*: int
Source   Edit   
ConstructionProject = econ_types.ConstructionProject
Source   Edit   
FighterSquadron = object
  id*: string
  commissionedTurn*: int
Colony-based fighter squadron Source   Edit   
GamePhase {.pure.} = enum
  Setup, Active, Paused, Completed
Source   Edit   
GameState = object
  gameId*: string
  turn*: int
  year*: int
  month*: int
  phase*: GamePhase
  starMap*: StarMap
  houses*: Table[HouseId, House]
  colonies*: Table[SystemId, Colony]
  fleets*: Table[FleetId, Fleet]
  diplomacy*: Table[(HouseId, HouseId), DiplomaticState]
  turnDeadline*: int64
  ongoingEffects*: seq[esp_types.OngoingEffect]
  spyScouts*: Table[string, SpyScout]
Source   Edit   
House = object
  id*: HouseId
  name*: string
  color*: string
  prestige*: int
  treasury*: int
  techTree*: TechTree
  eliminated*: bool
  negativePrestigeTurns*: int
  diplomaticRelations*: dip_types.DiplomaticRelations
  violationHistory*: dip_types.ViolationHistory
  espionageBudget*: esp_types.EspionageBudget
  dishonoredStatus*: dip_types.DishonoredStatus
  diplomaticIsolation*: dip_types.DiplomaticIsolation
  planetBreakerCount*: int
Source   Edit   
Shipyard = object
  id*: string
  commissionedTurn*: int
  docks*: int
  isCrippled*: bool
Orbital construction facility (assets.md:2.3.2.2) Source   Edit   
Spaceport = object
  id*: string
  commissionedTurn*: int
  docks*: int
Ground-based launch facility (assets.md:2.3.2.1) Source   Edit   
SpyMissionType {.pure.} = enum
  SpyOnPlanet, HackStarbase, SpyOnSystem
Types of spy scout missions (operations.md:6.2.9-6.2.11) Source   Edit   
SpyScout = object
  id*: string
  owner*: HouseId
  location*: SystemId
  eliLevel*: int
  mission*: SpyMissionType
  commissionedTurn*: int
  detected*: bool
Independent spy scout on intelligence mission Per assets.md:2.4.2 Source   Edit   
Starbase = object
  id*: string
  commissionedTurn*: int
  isCrippled*: bool
Orbital fortress (assets.md:2.4.4) Source   Edit   
TechTree = res_types.TechTree
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc advanceTurn(state: var GameState) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Advance to next turn, updating year/month Source   Edit   
proc calculatePrestige(state: GameState; houseId: HouseId): int {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Return current prestige for a house Prestige is tracked via events and stored in House.prestige Source   Edit   
proc canBuildPlanetBreaker(state: GameState; houseId: HouseId): bool {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if house can build another Planet-Breaker Source   Edit   
proc checkVictoryCondition(state: GameState): Option[HouseId] {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if any house has won the game Victory: prestige threshold (configurable) or last house standing Source   Edit   
proc createHomeColony(systemId: SystemId; owner: HouseId): Colony {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a starting homeworld colony Source   Edit   
proc getActiveHouses(state: GameState): seq[House] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all non-eliminated houses Source   Edit   
proc getColony(state: GameState; systemId: SystemId): Option[Colony] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get colony by system ID Source   Edit   
proc getCurrentFighterCount(colony: Colony): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get current number of fighter squadrons at colony Source   Edit   
proc getFighterCapacity(colony: Colony; fdMultiplier: float): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get effective fighter capacity (minimum of population and infrastructure limits) Source   Edit   
proc getFighterDoctrineMultiplier(techLevels: TechLevel): float {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get fighter doctrine multiplier from tech level Per economy.md tech tables: FD I = 1.0x, FD II = 1.5x, FD III = 2.0x CRITICAL: FD starts at level 1 (FD I), not 0! (gameplay.md:1.2) Source   Edit   
proc getFighterInfrastructureCapacity(colony: Colony): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate fighter capacity based on starbases Requires 1 operational Starbase per 5 FS Per military.toml: starbase_per_fighter_squadrons = 5 Source   Edit   
proc getFighterPopulationCapacity(colony: Colony; fdMultiplier: float): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate fighter capacity based on population Max FS = floor(PU / 100) × FD Multiplier Per military.toml: fighter_capacity_pu_divisor = 100 Source   Edit   
proc getFleet(state: GameState; fleetId: FleetId): Option[Fleet] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get fleet by ID Source   Edit   
proc getHouse(state: GameState; houseId: HouseId): Option[House] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get house by ID Source   Edit   
proc getHouseColonies(state: GameState; houseId: HouseId): seq[Colony] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get all colonies owned by a house Source   Edit   
proc getHouseFleets(state: GameState; houseId: HouseId): seq[Fleet] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get all fleets owned by a house Source   Edit   
proc getHousePopulationUnits(state: GameState; houseId: HouseId): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get total population units for a house across all colonies Source   Edit   
proc getHouseSquadronCount(state: GameState; houseId: HouseId): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Count total squadrons for a house across all fleets Source   Edit   
proc getOperationalShipyardCount(colony: Colony): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Count operational (non-crippled) shipyards Source   Edit   
proc getOperationalStarbaseCount(colony: Colony): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Count operational (non-crippled) starbases Source   Edit   
proc getPlanetBreakerLimit(state: GameState; houseId: HouseId): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get maximum Planet-Breakers allowed for house Limit = current colony count (homeworld counts) Source   Edit   
proc getShieldBlockChance(shieldLevel: int): float {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get shield block chance from config TODO: Load from ground_units_config.toml Placeholder values Source   Edit   
proc getSquadronLimit(state: GameState; houseId: HouseId): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate squadron limit for a house based on population Per military.toml: Squadron limit = Total PU ÷ 100 (minimum 8) Source   Edit   
proc getStarbaseGrowthBonus(colony: Colony): float {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Calculate population/IU growth bonus from starbases Per assets.md:2.4.4: 5% per operational starbase, max 15% (3 starbases) Source   Edit   
proc getTotalConstructionDocks(colony: Colony): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Calculate total construction docks from facilities Spaceports: 5 docks each Shipyards: 10 docks each (only operational ones) Source   Edit   
proc getTotalGroundDefense(colony: Colony): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Calculate total ground defense strength Ground batteries + armies + marines Source   Edit   
proc hasOperationalShipyard(colony: Colony): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check if colony has at least one operational shipyard Source   Edit   
proc hasPlanetaryShield(colony: Colony): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check if colony has an active planetary shield Source   Edit   
proc hasSpaceport(colony: Colony): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if colony has at least one spaceport Source   Edit   
proc initializeHouse(name: string; color: string): House {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Create a new house with starting resources Per economy.md:4.0: "ALL technology levels start at level 1, never 0" Source   Edit   
proc isOverFighterCapacity(colony: Colony; fdMultiplier: float): bool {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if colony has exceeded fighter capacity Source   Edit   
proc isOverSquadronLimit(state: GameState; houseId: HouseId): bool {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if house has exceeded squadron limit Source   Edit   
proc newGameState(gameId: string; playerCount: int; starMap: StarMap): GameState {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create initial game state with map and player houses Source   Edit  

Exports

HouseId, SystemId, FleetId, PlanetClass, ResourceRating, TechField, TechLevel, DiplomaticState, SpaceLiftShip, SpaceLiftCargo, CargoType

Made with Nim. Generated: 1980-01-01 00:00:00 UTC
